zh.lifeSummary: 當Constantine Angelos於1093年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，他的父親Manolis Angelus39歲，母親Theodora Angelina Kommenas54歲。他於大約1120年與Theodōra Komnēnos在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1166年7月在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constantine Angelos于1093年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，他的父亲Manolis Angelus39岁，母亲Theodora Angelina Kommenas54岁。他于大约1120年与Theodōra Komnēnos在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1166年7月在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Angelos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spiro, Alexandros, Constantine, Manos, Nikolaos, Stavros, Vasilios.

American shortened form of Greek patronymics such as Angelopoulos , derived from the personal name Angelos, which is from angelos (in Greek transliteration aggelos) ‘messenger, angel’ or a short form of the personal name Euangelos ‘bringer of good news’ (see Evangelista ). Compare Angelis .

variants.name: Angelides
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ). The suffix -ides, meaning ‘son/descendant of’, is classical, and was revived in the 19th century, in particular by Greeks from Asia Minor and Eastern Thrace.

variants.name: Angelopoulos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Andreas, Dimitrios, Angelos, Athanasia, Kostas, Nikolaos, Pericles, Spyridon, Spyros, Thanos, Vassilis.
Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese.

variants.name: Angelakis
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the diminutive suffix -akis, which is particularly typical for the surnames from Crete, where it was adopted massively in the 19th century.

variants.name: Angelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Konstantinos, Antonios, Athina, Christos, Dimitrios, Efthimios, Eleftherios, Georgios, Konstantino, Sevasti, Stratis.  Italian Angelo, Lia.

Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Standard Greek transliteration of this surname is Aggelis.
Shortened form of Italian   De Angelis  .

nameMeanings.name: Constantine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Constantinus, a derivative of Constans; see Constant . In early modern English the names Constant and Constantine were not always clearly distinguished. The Roman emperor Constantine the Great ( ?288–337 ) is specially honoured in the Christian Church as the first Christian emperor. The name was also borne by three kings of medieval Scotland, where it represents an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Conn , and is a traditional name in the Phipps (Marquesses of Normanby) family.

en.lifeSummary: When Constantine Angelos was born in 1093, in Byzantine Empire, his father, Manolis Angelus, was 39 and his mother, Theodora Angelina Kommenas, was 54. He married Theodōra Komnēnos about 1120, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in July 1166, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constantine Angelos est né en 1093, à Empire byzantin, son père, Manolis Angelus, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Theodora Angelina Kommenas, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Theodōra Komnēnos environ 1120, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1166, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constantine Angelos 1093 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manolis Angelus 39 und seine Mutter Theodora Angelina Kommenas 54. Er hat um 1120 in İstanbul, Türkei Theodōra Komnēnos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1166 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constantine Angelos è nato il nel 1093 nel Impero bizantino, il suo padre, Manolis Angelus, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Theodora Angelina Kommenas, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Theodōra Komnēnos circa 1120, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1166, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Philadelphia, Lydia, Roman Empire: ロマン エンパアーリディアフィラデルフィア
ja.Constantinople, Constantinople, Constant: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Constantine Angelosが1093年に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Manolis Angelusは39歳，母Theodora Angelina Kommenasは54歳であった。約1120年にトルコイスタンブルでTheodōra Komnēnosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1166年7月に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constantine Angelos(이)가 1093년 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manolis Angelus(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Theodora Angelina Kommenas(은)는 54세였다. 그는 대략 1120년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Theodōra Komnēnos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 7월 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constantine Angelos nasceu em 1093, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Manolis Angelus, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Theodora Angelina Kommenas, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Theodōra Komnēnos aproximadamente 1120, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1166, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constantine Angelos родился в 1093 г. в местности Византийская империя, его отцу по имени Manolis Angelus было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Theodora Angelina Kommenas, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Theodōra Komnēnos около 1120 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер июль 1166 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constantine Angelos nació en 1093, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Manolis Angelus, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Theodora Angelina Kommenas, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Theodōra Komnēnos aproximadamente 1120, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1166, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
